final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing editorial fashion illustration for a haute couture evening gown inspired by deep-sea creatures.

Style/medium: fashion illustration blended with editorial photography, haute couture runway campaign aesthetic, mixed media with digital painting and photographic elements
Composition: full-length figure shot, model standing centered against void backdrop, three-quarter view, medium distance to showcase full gown silhouette
Subject: floor-length evening gown with cascading multi-layered semi-transparent organza skirt printed with jellyfish tentacle motifs, structured bodice with three-dimensional embroidery mimicking coral reef textures, Swarovski crystals in blue, green and purple embedded throughout bodice
Scene/backdrop: pure black studio void, minimalist to eliminate distraction from garment
Lighting/mood: professional stage lighting from multiple angles, dramatic spotlighting to emphasize translucent fabric layers and bioluminescent glow effects, mysterious and luxurious atmosphere
Color palette: deep ocean blue as base, bioluminescent violet as accent glow, coral orange as warm highlight, iridescent shimmer throughout
Materials/textures: sheer organza with layered translucency, three-dimensional embroidered coral textures, faceted crystal surfaces catching light, fluid draping suggesting underwater movement
Avoid: 8K stuffer terms, generic stock photo aesthetic, cluttered background, cartoonish rendering, visible mannequin or hanger
